meanings.definition: the act of limiting movement or making incapable of movement
examples: the storm caused complete immobilization of the rescue team

meanings.definition: hold as reserve or withdraw from circulation; of capital
to hold fast or prevent from moving
examples: The child was pinned under the fallen tree

meanings.definition: prohibit the conversion or use of (assets)
examples: Freeze the assets of this hostile government

meanings.definition: cause to be unable to move
examples: The sudden storm immobilized the traffic
